reviews.title: Good enough for short stay

reviews.response:

Thank you for choosing Minasi Grand Hotel for your recent business trip and for sharing your candid feedback.

At the same time, we have taken note of your ratings regarding Cleanliness, Facilities, and Value for money. Minasi Grand Hotel

reviews.title: Good service

reviews.title: A good value for a comfortable stay that with all the usual Western amenities.
reviews.positives: Good value for a four-star hotel that will satisfy the needs of a Western tourist who wants the comfort and amenities of a Marriot or Sheraton. The room was large, clean and fully equipped, including a TV with numerous Western channels such as CNN and the BBC. The location is about 40 minutes walk from the Old Quarter and 15 minutes from the French Quarter, but there is plenty of local street life and businesses, as well as several upscale restaurants in the immediate vicinity. The young  men and ladies staffing the front are all fluent English speakers and the morning breakfast buffet has all the usual American and European favorites, augmented by several Vietnamese dishes.
reviews.negatives: No major complaints. A good deal in a decent location for tourists who don't want to overspend but need familiar amenities. The breakfast buffet was a little bland, but better than version you usually get in an American hotel. The young ladies on the staff were charming to converse with, but the conversations all ended with a request for a 5-star Google review. I appreciate their ambition and desire to get ahead, but it came across as a little crass.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Good price for what you get
reviews.positives: The staff is extremely friendly, one of the guys speaks Spanish, English, Mandarin and Vietnamese. I would definitely go back. Breakfast is good too.
reviews.negatives: The gym location is a little complicated, but other than that, I thought the hotel was very good. The swimming pool is small, but I didn't get to use it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Simple hotel on a quiet street, 15-20 minute walk to the old quarter. Breakfast was decent, but refilling of the warm dishes was a bit slow. The room was mostly clean, but there was some sticky substance ( like gum ) on a few spots on the floor, so the cleaning seems a bit rushed. Hot water pressure was good, but it runs out after some time (maybe like 10 min). The furniture looked good. The fridge was noisy, but you can turn it off. The employees were very friendly, helped me with luggage and tried to do the small talk during breakfast.

The soundproofing is very bad, like in any other hotel in Vietnam. I had a room in the back, so the window faced a lightwell, so it was dark. If someone in other room in the same lightwell opened a window - you hear all the noise from them.

Overall a good hotel, though maybe a bit pricey (but i was there during nye). Maybe during usual dates it's more affordable.
reviews.response:
Dear Dmitrij, thank you for staying with us for 3 nights and for providing such a detailed and constructive review.

We are thrilled with your 10/10 score for our Service and glad our staff made you feel welcome. However, we sincerely apologize for the areas where we fell short:

Cleanliness: We are sorry about the spots on the floor. Our housekeeping team has been retrained to ensure a more thorough inspection, even during busy periods.

Facilities: We have instructed the kitchen to be more proactive in refilling breakfast dishes. Our technical team is also checking the fridge noise and the hot water system to improve the experience.

Soundproofing & Light: As a typical building structure in Hanoi's center, some rooms face the lightwell for quietness, but we understand this can affect natural light.

Value: Since your stay was during the New Year's Eve peak, prices were higher than usual. We hope to welcome you back during a regular period to provide a more budget-friendly experience.

reviews.title: We had a great comfortable friendly stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
We had a great stay at the hotel! The breakfast was fantastic with a wide selection of Vietnamese & Western food, the staff were all attentive & nice, and the room was clean with a massive bathroom.  The hotel’s located a 15 minute walk out of the centre of Hanoi, which was ideal for us too. 

The only negative would be the pool, which is a lot smaller than the photos suggest. We didn’t end up using it, but worth noting for anyone staying for the pool. 

Overall a great hotel!
reviews.response:
Dear Lauren,

Minasi Grand Hotel would like to sincerely thank you for taking the time to leave us this detailed 8.8/10 review following your two-night group stay in our Superior Deluxe Room.

We are absolutely thrilled to hear that you loved our varied breakfast selection of Vietnamese and Western dishes, found our staff attentive and friendly, and appreciated the clean, spacious bathroom in your guest room. We are also grateful that you enjoyed our convenient location just a short walk from central Hanoi, and that you rated our value for money and service perfectly at 10/10.

We take your feedback about the pool size very seriously, and we will review our marketing materials to ensure our photos accurately reflect the actual dimensions of our pool to avoid any future disappointment for our guests.

Thank you again for your honest and thoughtful feedback, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to Minasi Grand Hotel soon for another excellent stay!
Best regards,
The Ma

reviews.title: A hotel that is kept clean and has friendly staff.
reviews.text: In Hoan Kiem, it is located somewhat far away, making it a bit difficult to walk in hot weather, but if the weather is not too hot, it is a walkable distance. The hotel is clean, and all the staff are very friendly and welcoming, which was impressive. The breakfast isn't very varied, but it is clean and consists of light meals suitable for breakfast. In particular, the pho and plain yogurt were very good. One downside is that while the standard room has a window, it is closely adjacent to the adjacent building, making it feel like there is no window at all. I recommend reserving a higher-tier room even if it costs a bit more.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel with warm, attentive staff and beautiful location!
reviews.positives:
Minasi Grand is a really lovely, small hotel very close to a number of locations in Hanoi. Old Quarter and French Quarter are both about a 20-30 minute walk away, or a short taxi ride. The neighborhood where the hotel itself is located is lovely and full of local places to eat and cafes to hang out, also there are many stores to buy ao dai dresses.

The staff are what really makes Minasi Grand stand out - everyone is kind and helpful, and there is no upselling of tours or goods of any kind. Emily is an excellent trip advisor and I would highly recommend chatting with her about trip options if you would like to venture outside of Hanoi. They do day trips as well as multi-day stays. We visited the perfume pagoda, Binh Ninh and several crafts villages and couldn't be happier.

Breakfast is excellent, served from 6AM-10PM with attentive service. Beds are comfy. Hotel is spotlessly clean. Would highly recommend staying here during your trip to Hanoi!
reviews.negatives: The only negative comment is that the hotel's spa is still under renovations so we couldn't visit it, but look forward to coming back when they have the spa set up!

reviews.title: I didn't expect it, but I was very satisfied.
reviews.text: If you go to hotels in Hanoi, there are many that are cheap, dirty, or old, but this place is clean for the price and the staff is friendly. It's located a bit away from Hoan Kiem Lake, so it's quiet and nice in the evening. The main tourists were from France and Russia, and everyone had breakfast, so make sure to go down for a meal at 7 AM. By 7:30 AM, it seems like there will be too many people to eat comfortably. I am very satisfied and returning after a long time. I booked for 1.5 million VND.

I've stayed in countless hotels in the world and this is probably the best value for money hotel I've ever stayed in my entire life.

For the price of 2 stars, the manager here definitely has the mindset of a 6 star-hotel manager. It's very rare to see staff running to lend a hand to customers in Vietnam in general. The manager also went the extra mile when it comes to putting the customers first. Although the room is basic (clean!), we still felt like we've enjoyed 6 star satisfaction.

This will be the only option for us when we come back to Hanoi.
Thank you so much, manager!

reviews.positives: Nous avons eu la chance d’être surclassés dans la chambre Studio. Tout était propre, spacieux, le ménage fait tous les jours. La literie était très confortable et nous avions tout le nécessaire. Tout au long de notre séjour, tout le personnel sans exception était aux petits soins sans en faire trop, c’était très agréable! L’hôtel est situé dans une ruelle calme, en dehors du centre mais ce n’est pas trop loin non plus du centre. Le petit-déjeuner est bon et varié et plusieurs plats changent chaque jour ce qui est agréable pour les plus longs séjours.
reviews.negatives: Il y avait quelques cm d’espace entre le sol et la porte d’entrée, donc nous entendions les bruits du couloir et certains clients étaient très bruyants (ce n’est évidemment pas la faute de l’hôtel)

reviews.title: The hotel is clean, and the staff is extremely friendly.
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, clean, and offers the best prices I've ever booked in Hanoi. Although it's not located in the Old Quarter, it's still in the central district, making it easy to get around. The hotel is quite clean, the utensils are very clean, and the food is delicious. I will book this hotel again next time I visit Hanoi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Tout, la propreté, la gentillesse des personnes qui travaillent dans l'hôtel, tout particulièrement Layla et Emily.
L'hôtel est situé à 15 minutes à pied du vieux quartier, il est dans une ruelle calme. Son emplacement est suffisamment proche de tout et permet d'explorer un quartier plus authentique de Hanoï.
La piscine est suffisamment grande pour se reposer après la journée, je recommande fortement cet établissement.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: I recommend a hotel.
reviews.text: I planned to stay long-term, so I searched for hotels more carefully! It was a hotel that had everything I wanted. First of all, all the staff were friendly, and my room was cleaned thoroughly whenever I requested it, so it was always clean just like the first day I arrived! And the breakfast was great too~! The next time I go to Vietnam, I will definitely book this hotel again!!

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel an passabler Lage
reviews.positives:
Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Das Zimmer war geräumig und gut ausgestattet.
Auch bot das Frühstücksbuffet eine grosse Auswahl. Wenn man ein frühes check-out hat, werden Plastikbehältnisse bereitgestellt, damit man vom Frühstücksbuffet Esswaren auf die Weiterreise mitnehmen kann.
reviews.negatives: Trotz der Lage des Hotels an einer Nebenstrasse, war der Verkehrslärm gut hörbar. Das ist aber fast überall so in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Un super séjour !
reviews.text:
Le personnel est adorable, notamment Layla, Mark, Helen qui nous ont accompagné tout le long du séjour.
Nous avons pris la chambre premier prix elle était très bien, très propre. Petite attention les fenêtres donnent sur un mur.
Le petit déjeuner est très copieux nous avons bien mangé. Mesure d’attention sur la piscine, l’aménagement n’est pas terminé. 

Vous pouvez vous baigner, mais il n’y a pas de quoi se poser. Les images que l’ont voit sur l’annonce du site de l’hôtel sont des images de synthèse, elles ne reflète pas la réalité. 
Je pense que d’ici quelques semaines voir mois, la piscine sera vraiment super ! 

Nous recommandons cet hôtel !
reviews.response:
Dear Cynthia,

On behalf of the Management Team at Minasi Grand Hotel, thank you so much for your perfect 10/10 rating and for choosing to celebrate your stay with us this February!

We are absolutely delighted that you had "un super séjour!" A very special thank you from Layla, Mark, and Helen. They were all so touched to be mentioned by name—accompanying our guests throughout their journey is what they love to do most. I have officially commended them for their "adorable" and attentive service.

We also appreciate your helpful and honest feedback regarding the room and our facilities:

The Room: We are glad you found our lead-in room category clean and comfortable. As you noted, these rooms face an interior wall; for your next visit, we would love to upgrade you to a City View room so you can enjoy the natural light and the streets of Hanoi!

Breakfast: It’s wonderful to hear you enjoyed our generous breakfast spread. We believe a hearty meal is the best way to start a day of explori

reviews.title: Super Hotel in Hanoi
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel ist sehr zu empfehlen.
Es liegt im Französischen Viertel in einer (für Hanoi) ruhigeren Straße. Viele Restaurants außen rum und auch noch eine gute Lage um in die Altstadt zu kommen. 
Die Zimmer sind komfortabel eingerichtet und wird jeden Tag sauber gemacht! :)
Die Mitarbeiter sind super nett und hilfsbereit, Sarah und Layla an der Rezeption haben uns bei Tourempfehlungen und Planung unterstützt und Emma hat uns jeden Morgen beim Frühstück begrüßt! 
Das Frühstücksbuffet ist super und die Suppe schmeckt besonders gut 🙂
Danke für den schönen Aufenthalt, wir würden wieder kommen!
reviews.negatives:
Es könnten noch mehr Liegen am Pool sein, Platz wäre ja eigentlich da.. 
Sonst alles top!

Lit confortable. Personnels très gentils surtout le jeune homme à l’accueil qui s’appelle Quan. 
Je recommande 100%.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Das Personal ist hervorragend! Insbesondere Emily von der Rezeption, die uns bei allen Fragen mit Empfehlungen etc weitergeholfen hat, sogar noch nach unserem Aufenthalt!

Wir haben insgesamt 5 Nächte im Hotel verbracht und können es sehr empfehlen.

Das Bett ist sehr bequem und die Dusche hat einen guten Wasserdruck. Wir konnten bereits vor Check-in Time einchecken, weil unser Zimmer schon früher fertig war.
Unserem Wunsch nach einem Zimmer mit mehr Tageslicht wurde nachgekommen und uns auf ein anderes Zimmer umgebucht. DANKE!

- 
Da das Hotel links und rechts von Häusern umgeben ist, liegen einige Zimmer so, dass es zwar Fenster hat, diese aber indoor gegen eine Wand liegen und daher fast kein Tageslicht reinkommt. Wenn man Tageslicht haben möchte, dann das Delux Zimmer mit Balkon buchen.

reviews.title: Super Lage und hervorragendes Personal
reviews.positives:
Ich hatte einen tollen Aufenthalt im Minasi Grand Hotel.
Das Hotel ist nicht weit von der Altstadt entfernt, sodass man viele Sehenswürdigkeiten zu Fuß besuchen kann. Das Design des Hotels ist sehr modern (es wurde gerade erst renoviert) und das Personal ist ausgesprochen nett und hilfsbereit. Besonders Fabio hat mir viele gute Ratschläge gegeben, die meinen Aufenthalt vereinfacht haben. 
Schon vor Reiseantritt konnte ich mich jederzeit bei Fragen und Problemen (aufgrund meines Fluges) per WhatsApp an das Personal wenden und bekam jedes Mal sehr zeitig eine hilfreiche Antwort.
Die Auswahl beim Frühstück enthielt eine Mischung aus leckeren westlichen und asiatischen Gerichten, die für meinen Geschmack vom Umfang her vollkommen ausreichte.

reviews.title: スタッフの教育ができていない
reviews.text:
バス、シャワーの温度が低くぬるま湯だったため、スタッフに改善をお願いしたが、英語力が十分ではなく、また、違うスタッフに話しをすると、お湯がでない理由が異なり、4泊したが、結果改善されなかった。

また、ランドリーもスーツケースに入っているものをランドリーシートに記入、サインもしていないのに、不在時に勝手にランドリーされ、ホテルにクレームした。日本であれば、顧客の所持物に勝手に触れ、移動させれば窃盗である。

ゆえに、ホテルのサービスレベル、教育は最低であり、二度宿泊はしたくないホテルである。

reviews.positives: Vriendelijk personeel , bij het inchecken ging het echter mis met onze kamer . We hadden een kamer met bad geboekt . Zoals ook op Booking vermeld stond . Echter bleek dit in werkelijkheid niet het geval . We kregen daarvoor voor dezelfde prijs een upgrade naar een suite met bad . Dat was goed geregeld . En naar ons idee ook terecht .
reviews.negatives: Wat ik al meer in de reviews heb gelezen dat de foto's op de site NIET kloppen met de werkelijkheid ( erg misleidend ) . Het zou verstandig zijn dat het hotel ook de foto's vernieuwd en duidelijk aangeeft waar wel of geen bad bij in zit . Bij de tekst staat namelijk wel een bad bij de kamer . Terwijl dat niet zo is . Kamer rook niet fris , in bad gaan kan alleen in de ochtend denk ik . In de avond is er geen ( voldoende ) warm water om het bad vol te laten lopen ( weinig waterdruk ) . Het is allemaal niet echt schoon meer en ook slecht onderhouden . Airco doet het soms wel en ook niet . We hadden bij de receptie aangegeven dat het koud was in onze kamer ( op dat moment ca 15 graden ) maar men vond dit een normale temperatuur . Hotel verwarming stond aan zei men . Ontbijt was voor de betaalde prijs a € 49.00 goed maar niet veel Europese keuze/ variatie . Ik zie in veel reviews dat ze reageren dat ze dingen zullen ondernemen om dat beter te doen . Dit hebben wij niet gezien tijdens ons verblijf . Mijn mening is dat dit voor een 3 sterren hotel prima is . Maar zeker geen 4 sterren waard .
